Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CONSUMER AFFAIRS AND PROTECTION

Title: Enacts the "CALM act" relating to commercial advertisement volume
Summary: Enacts the "CALM act" relating to prohibiting a person, firm, partnership, association or corporation providing a video streaming service that operates in the state of New York from transmitting the audio of commercial advertisements louder than the video content the advertisements accompany; provides penalties for violations.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to enacting the "CALM act" relating to commercial advertisement volume
